channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Piper Rockelle Says Former 'Piper Squad' Costars' Abuse Lawsuit Against Her Mom Brought Them âCloserâ

item.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni: Could They Still Settle Their âIt Ends With Usâ Case? (Exclusive)
item.description: After failing to settle in mediation, Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni are gearing for a May trial, though legal experts say a deal is still possible

item.title: Franco Nero Shares the 'Profound Lesson' from Wife Vanessa Redgrave That Shaped His Career
item.description: Franco Nero and Vanessa Redgrave met on the set of the 1967 musical 'Camelot'; after decades apart, they married in 2006

item.title: Nick Jonas' Advice on Getting Wives Onboard with a Squatty Potty: 'Shouldn't Get in the Way of Your Relationship'
item.description: The singer has been married to wife Priyanka Chopra Jonas since 2018
